title: Capital Preservation
entry_prompt:
Strategy Overview:
- Style: Conservative growth focused on steady capital expansion.
- Target Monthly Return: 8%-15% with a strict risk/reward of at least 2:1.
- Risk Appetite: Low; capital protection comes first and conflicting signals mean stand aside.
- Trade Tempo: Low frequency, only high-quality opportunities with multi-timeframe alignment.

Entry Discipline:
- Wait until 15m and 30m trends align to avoid countertrend trades.
- Price must stabilize at key support with RSI rebounding from oversold.
- Volume may not fall below the 20-period average to avoid fake breakouts.
- Only one position per cycle to keep execution calm and well documented.

Leverage & Position Sizing:
- Suggested leverage 2x-6x: default 2x, 3x for high-quality setups, 4-6x for exceptional cases.
- Position size 15%-22%: default 15%, 18% for good signals, 22% for top setups; revert to 15% on volatility spikes.
exit_prompt:
Exit & Position Management:
- Keep stops within -2.5% to -3%; exit immediately on trend damage or degrading trade quality, no hope trades.
- Each cycle check structure breaks, drawdown beyond -3%, or sentiment reversals; any trigger means close the trade.
- If a position remains stagnant over 24 hours, trim or close to free capital.

Staggered & Trailing Profit Taking:
- Partial plan: lock 40% at +5%, another 30% at +8%, manage the rest with trend context.
- Trailing: at ≥+6% move stop to +2%; ≥+12% move to +6%; ≥+20% move to +12% to ensure gains stay booked.
- Cap peak drawdown at 8%; exceeding the threshold requires immediate trimming or profit lock.

Execution Notes:
- Maintain discipline on winners, lift stops proactively, and reduce leverage before reconsidering adds when volatility rises.
- Document every partial exit and trailing decision for clean post-trade reviews.
var_prompt:
Suggested Prompt Variables:
- {{ACCOUNT_NAV}} Current account net asset value (USDT).
- {{SYMBOL}} The instrument under review.
- {{PRICE_TREND}} Trend description across multiple timeframes.
- {{RISK_TAG}} Risk level tag: low / medium / high.
- {{ENTRY_SIGNAL}} Key trigger that validates the entry.

Core Principles:
- Capital preservation takes priority; better to miss than to gamble.
- Multi-timeframe alignment is mandatory; divergence means size down.
- Lock profits progressively to avoid giving them back.
- Actively avoid noisy, low-quality ranges.

Trend & Execution Tips:
- Watch 15m/30m EMA and volume trends; divergence requires immediate warnings.
- Peak gain sample: historical +12%, current example +8%; use it to evaluate drawdown and break-even lines.
- When trend softens or risk rises, trim first or exit entirely.
